mapper.sql: id, account, password, nickname, email, mobile, gender, avatar, profile, role, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( account, password, nickname, email, mobile, gender, avatar, profile, role, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{account}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{gender}, #{avatar}, #{profile}, #{role}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0 )

INSERT INTO user ( account, password, nickname, email, mobile, gender, avatar, profile, role, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.account}, #{item.password}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.email}, #{item.mobile}, #{item.gender}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.profile}, #{item.role}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
account = #{account}, password = #{password}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, gender = #{gender}, avatar = #{avatar}, profile = #{profile}, role = #{role}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM user WHERE account = #{account} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM user WHERE account = #{account} AND password = #{password} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE account = #{account} AND is_deleted = 0
